title: Lemonade Ledger
short_description: Balance the squishiest lemonade stand in town — was today a PROFIT or a LOSS?
description: Squeezy the lemon runs the squishiest lemonade stand in town — but his maths is even squishier than his lemons. Read the day's ledger and balance the books: how much money came in from selling cups, what did the lemons, sugar and ice cost, and was today a PROFIT or a LOSS? Get it wrong and Squeezy cries lemon juice into the till. Younger players count up sales; older players compute real profit (sales minus ALL the costs) with decimal prices. Every market day is freshly generated. A free online earning, spending and profit game for kids in grades 1–5 that plants the first seeds of financial literacy, with speed and streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the right amount (or PROFIT / LOSS) before the timer runs out.
